questionnaireData.title: Assertiveness
questionnaireData.instruction: Answer all the statements to know your result.
description: Answer spontaneously by clicking True or False.
True = if you think or react like this most of the time.
False = If you almost never think or react like this.

questions.text: I often say «yes» while I would like to say «no».
I defend my rights, without giving up the rights of others.
I choose to hide what I think or feel when I don’t know somebody very well.
I am rather authoritarian and determined.
It is mostly easier and more convenient to act through a ‘middle man’ than directly.
I am not scared to give criticism and to say to people what I really think.
I don’t dare to refuse certain tasks that are not really under my responsibility.
I am not scared to give my opinion, even if there are some rather hostile people around.
When I am involved in a discussion, I’d rather put myself ‘in the back’ to see which direction the discussion will take.
People reproach me sometimes that I like to contradict them.
It is difficult for me to listen to others.
I always try to belong to the ‘insiders’, that has helped me a lot already.
Generally speaking, people consider me as being pretty practical and easy in communicating with others.
My relations with others are merely depending on trust than on domination or calculation.
I don’t like to ask assistance to a colleague; he could think that I am not capable of doing things.
I am shy and I feel disadvantaged (inhibited) when I have to do something unusual.
People say that I am short tempered; I get easily excited and people tend to laugh with that.
I feel very comfortable when I talk to someone one on one.
I am playing games quite often. How else can you reach your goals?
I like to talk and I sometimes tell people to quit talking, although I am not always aware of that (or I don’t realize it right away).
I am ambitious and I will do whatever has to be done to get where I want to get.
I mostly know whom you have to talk to and when: that is important to succeed in life.
If there is a disagreement, I’ll always strive for a realistic compromise, based on the common interest.
I like to show you my cards.
I tend to postpone the things that I have to do, to a later day/time.
I often leave a task unaccomplished, without really finishing it.
I always act the way I am, without hiding my feelings.
A lot of things have to happen before you can intimidate me.
Scaring the others is often a good method to gain power.
If someone tries to make a fool of me, I will seek revenge when the opportunity arises.
A good way of criticizing someone is by reproaching him that he doesn’t follow his own rules. So in the end he has to agree with me.
I know how to ‘use’ the system : I always find a way out of things.
I can be myself and be socially accepted at the same time.
When I don’t agree with others, I don’t mind telling them that right away and I’ll make sure they’ll listen to me.
I always make sure that I don’t bother others.
I find it hard to choose a side and make choices.
When I am in a group, I don’t like to be the only one with a certain opinion. In that case I rather not talk.
I am not afraid of talking in public.
Life is a continuing road full of fights for power and struggles.
I am not afraid to start dangerous or adventurous challenges.
Creating conflicts can sometimes be more efficient than trying to reduce tensions.
Talking in a straight way is a good way of gaining trust.
I can listen and I don’t stop others from talking.
Whatever I decided, I will always bring it to a good end.
I am not scared to express my feelings the way I experience them.
I know how to get people to like me and win them for my ideas.
Flattering people is just a good method to get what you want to get.
I have problems reducing my speaking time.
I know how to handle strong irony.
I am helpful and easy going. Sometimes I even let people «use» me.
I rather observe than participate.
I rather stay in the background than coming to the foreground.
I don’t think manipulating is an efficient solution.
You don’t have to show too fast your aims, that is unthoughtful.
It seems that I sometimes shock people with the things that I say.
I would rather be a wolf than a lamb.
Manipulating others a little bit is often the only practical way of getting what you want to get.
I mostly know how to protest in an effective way, without being excessively aggressive.
I think that problems can only be solved if you look for the underlying reasons.
I don’t like it if people would think I am no good.
I often say «yes» while I would like to say «no».

raw.text: I often say «yes» while I would like to say «no».

questionToGroupMapping.questionText: I often say «yes» while I would like to say «no».
I defend my rights, without giving up the rights of others.
I choose to hide what I think or feel when I don’t know somebody very well.
I am rather authoritarian and determined.
It is mostly easier and more convenient to act through a ‘middle man’ than directly.
I am not scared to give criticism and to say to people what I really think.
I don’t dare to refuse certain tasks that are not really under my responsibility.
I am not scared to give my opinion, even if there are some rather hostile people around.
When I am involved in a discussion, I’d rather put myself ‘in the back’ to see which direction the discussion will take.
People reproach me sometimes that I like to contradict them.
It is difficult for me to listen to others.
I always try to belong to the ‘insiders’, that has helped me a lot already.
Generally speaking, people consider me as being pretty practical and easy in communicating with others.
My relations with others are merely depending on trust than on domination or calculation.
I don’t like to ask assistance to a colleague; he could think that I am not capable of doing things.
I am shy and I feel disadvantaged (inhibited) when I have to do something unusual.
People say that I am short tempered; I get easily excited and people tend to laugh with that.
I feel very comfortable when I talk to someone one on one.
I am playing games quite often. How else can you reach your goals?
I like to talk and I sometimes tell people to quit talking, although I am not always aware of that (or I don’t realize it right away).
I am ambitious and I will do whatever has to be done to get where I want to get.
I mostly know whom you have to talk to and when: that is important to succeed in life.
If there is a disagreement, I’ll always strive for a realistic compromise, based on the common interest.
I like to show you my cards.
I tend to postpone the things that I have to do, to a later day/time.
I often leave a task unaccomplished, without really finishing it.
I always act the way I am, without hiding my feelings.
A lot of things have to happen before you can intimidate me.
Scaring the others is often a good method to gain power.
If someone tries to make a fool of me, I will seek revenge when the opportunity arises.
A good way of criticizing someone is by reproaching him that he doesn’t follow his own rules. So in the end he has to agree with me.
I know how to ‘use’ the system : I always find a way out of things.
I can be myself and be socially accepted at the same time.
When I don’t agree with others, I don’t mind telling them that right away and I’ll make sure they’ll listen to me.
I always make sure that I don’t bother others.
I find it hard to choose a side and make choices.
When I am in a group, I don’t like to be the only one with a certain opinion. In that case I rather not talk.
I am not afraid of talking in public.
Life is a continuing road full of fights for power and struggles.
I am not afraid to start dangerous or adventurous challenges.
Creating conflicts can sometimes be more efficient than trying to reduce tensions.
Talking in a straight way is a good way of gaining trust.
I can listen and I don’t stop others from talking.
Whatever I decided, I will always bring it to a good end.
I am not scared to express my feelings the way I experience them.
I know how to get people to like me and win them for my ideas.
Flattering people is just a good method to get what you want to get.
I have problems reducing my speaking time.
I know how to handle strong irony.
I am helpful and easy going. Sometimes I even let people «use» me.
I rather observe than participate.
I rather stay in the background than coming to the foreground.
I don’t think manipulating is an efficient solution.
You don’t have to show too fast your aims, that is unthoughtful.
It seems that I sometimes shock people with the things that I say.
I would rather be a wolf than a lamb.
Manipulating others a little bit is often the only practical way of getting what you want to get.
I mostly know how to protest in an effective way, without being excessively aggressive.
I think that problems can only be solved if you look for the underlying reasons.
I don’t like it if people would think I am no good.
